user.title: ChargePoint API Credentials
user.description: Enter your ChargePoint API credentials. Find these under *Organizations > API Info* in the ChargePoint portal. See the [API setup guide]({api_docs_url}) for help.

data_description.api_key: Your ChargePoint API license key (long hex string from Organizations > API Info)

pick_station.title: Select Your Station
pick_station.description: Choose which charging station to add and set the polling interval.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to ChargePoint API. Check your network.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API credentials. Verify your License Key and Password.
error.no_stations: No charging stations found for this account.

abort.already_configured: This ChargePoint station is already configured.
abort.no_stations: No charging stations found for this account.
